title: coelogyne pallida
intro: Coelogyne pallida, also known as the pale coelogyne, is a species of orchid native to India and Southeast Asia, characterized by its white and yellow-colored flowers. In traditional medicine, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which are said to include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne pallida are believed to include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the relief of digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Coelogyne pallida include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to create teas, tonics, and ointments for medicinal purposes.
